title: The Top 7 Stocks to Buy Before They Take Off Next Year
text: As we put 2023 to bed, it is the right time to reflect on your portfolio and reorganize it for the year ahead. I'll be upfront: 2024 does have risks as the economy continues to absorb repeated rate hikes from the Fed.

title: If the Fed Lowers Interest Rates in 2024, This Warren Buffett Stock Could Win Big
text: Moody's is one of the top credit ratings businesses in the U.S. Lower debt issuance has hurt Moody's investor services segment in the past couple of years. Market participants expect the Federal Reserve to cut interest rates in 2024, which could release pent-up demand for debt.

title: Seven tech stocks that can broaden your exposure beyond the “Magnificent Seven”
text: During the bull market of 2023, the “Magnificent Seven” stocks have dominated financial media coverage, and rightly so. There is no question that this group of companies has been performing very well in their core businesses and analysts expect the good times to continue.

title: These 3 Stocks Have Made Warren Buffett the Most Money in 2023. Are They No-Brainer Buys for the New Year?
text: Apple is Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding by far and its shares have skyrocketed more than 50% in 2023. American Express has been a Buffett stock for decades and has delivered a year-to-date gain of over 20% Moody's ranks as Berkshire's eighth-largest holding and its stock is up more than 40% this year.

title: Got $1,000? 5 Buffett Stocks to Buy and Hold Forever
text: Amazon has solid growth prospects in e-commerce and even better opportunities with its cloud services platform. Bank of America ranks among the most innovative banks in the world.

title: 12 Stocks I Hope To Buy If The Market Crashes
text: I've been stockpiling cash for real estate transactions and not actively buying stocks in the market. I aim to have a cash position for the next bear market and am not finding many attractive buying opportunities currently. Here's my list of high conviction long-term bullish picks that I'd like to buy during a market downturn.

title: Moody's to Host Innovation Update: An Inside Look at Moody's Research Assistant
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) will host a webcast briefing on the launch of Moody's Research Assistant, a first-of-its-kind search and analytical tool powered by generative artificial intelligence (GenAI), on December 14, 2023, at 11:30 a.m. Eastern Time (ET). In response to investor demand, the event will feature an overview of Moody's GenAI strategy, a demonstration showcasing Moody's Research Assistant capabilities and a Q&A session. The webcast will be moder.

title: 1 Buffett Stock Nobody Talks About That's Trounced the Market Over the Past 5 Years
text: Moody's is a top credit rating agency with steady recurring revenue driving sales and margin expansion. Business is picking up again after a sluggish showing in 2022 due to high interest rates Berkshire Hathaway is its largest investor, with a stake worth more than 13% of the company.

title: Moody's changes Hong Kong's outlook to negative from stable
text: Moody's on Wednesday downgraded its outlook on Hong Kong to negative from stable, just a day after Moody's cut China's credit outlook.

title: Moody's Launches Moody's Research Assistant, a GenAI Tool to Power Analytic Insights
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE:MCO) today announced the launch of Moody's Research Assistant, a first-of-its-kind search and analytical tool powered by generative artificial intelligence (GenAI). Leveraging Moody's extensive proprietary content and the latest large language models (LLMs), the product helps customers generate new insights from the breadth and depth of Moody's credit research, data, and analytics. title: Moody's cut China's credit outlook to negative on rising debt risks
text: This move underscores concerns over rising debt levels and the impact on broader growth in the world's second-largest economy
